subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Hearken thou unto My Call. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the All-Forgiving, the All-Bountiful. Say: All praise be unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه ان استمعی ندائی انه لا اله الا هو الغفور الکریم قولی لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
